home.description: Your authenticated home page. Replace this with your real app's home screen.
home.nextStepBody: Use the /feature skill to draft a spec, scaffold the API and pages, and register the feature in PLAN.md.
home.apiDocsBody: Triplane ships with OpenAPI 3.1 docs via Scalar UI. Visit:
home.itemsCardBody: Browse the example feature that ships with Triplane — CRUD plus presigned file uploads end-to-end.

items.listSubtitle: Your items with attached photos. Backed by /api/v1/items.
items.empty: No items yet. Click “New item” to create your first one.
items.createDialogBody: Give it a title, optionally a description, and optionally pick a few photos to attach right away.
items.deleteDialogBody: This soft-deletes the item. Photos are preserved but hidden.
items.deleteAttachmentDialogBody: This soft-deletes the photo. The file stays in storage until cleanup.

design.title: Design system
design.subtitle: Every token, type scale, radius, and sample component that ships with Triplane. Flip the theme toggle to see the palette rotate.
design.sampleDialogBody: Dialog consumes design-system tokens via shadcn.

new.title: Forge a new project
new.subtitle: Describe your idea, pick a brand color, and let the Triplane skills bootstrap a full-stack app (web + Android + iOS) in a temporary git worktree.
new.switchToQuick: Just want to type one paragraph? Try quick mode →

quick.title: Quick mode
quick.subtitle: Type one paragraph describing your idea. The forge extracts the fields for you and asks only what it can't infer.
quick.switchToFullForm: ← Prefer to fill the full form yourself
quick.promptPlaceholder: A recipe-sharing app for home cooks 25–45 who already text recipes to friends. Let them snap photos, tag by meal type, and share to small private groups…
quick.promptHint: 3–5 sentences usually gives the extractor enough to skip follow-up questions.
quick.proposedBody: Review the draft. If it looks right, click Bootstrap to create the worktree and start /init-app.

form.taglinePlaceholder: Share recipes with your cooking circle.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: One paragraph: who it's for, what problem it solves, how. 3–5 sentences.
form.targetUserPlaceholder: Home cooks 25–45 who already text recipes to friends.
form.featuresHint: 1–7 features. Each is something a user can do in the app (not infrastructure like 'authentication').
form.identityHint: Defaults are derived from the product name. Override if you want something different.
form.brandEnable: Pick a brand color for the design system

session.title: Forge session
session.placeholderBody1: The worktree was created at the session ID above and IDEA.md was written with your frontmatter + prose body. Check the tmp path in the worktree output.
session.placeholderBody2: The Agent SDK integration lands in sub-phase 9.2 + 9.3 + 9.4. For now this page is a stub.
session.placeholderBody3: To verify: cd /tmp/triplane-forge/<session-id> and cat IDEA.md.
